REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT LAURA MILES' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. DEFENDANT FAILS TO DEMUR TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONSTRICTIVE/RESULTING TRUST. (SEE DEMURRER), THEREFORE THE DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT ( SEE NOTICE OF DEMURRER) SURVIVES THE GENERAL DEMURRER. REQUEST FOR SANCTION PURSUANT TO CCP 128.5. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 128.5(F) ("ANY SANCTIONS IMPOSED PURSUANT TO THIS SECTION SHALL BE IMPOSED CONSISTENTLY WITH THE STANDARDS, CONDITIONS, AND PROCEDURES SET FORTH IN SUBDIVISIONS (C), (D), AND (H) OF SECTION 128.7.") DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Clifford R. Horner, Esq. of Horner & Singer, (925-943-6570), APPEARING THROUGH COURT CALL for Laura A. Miles, Defendant and moving party.
John H. O'Reilly, Esq., (415-392-2860), for Jonathan E. Miles, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT LAURA MILES' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Defendant fails to demur to the 4th cause of action for constrictive/resulting trust. (See Demurrer), therefore the demurrer to the Second Amended Complaint ( See Notice of Demurrer) survives the general demurrer. Request for sanction pursuant to CCP 128.5. Plaintiff failed to comply with CCP 128.5(f) ("Any sanctions imposed pursuant to this section shall be imposed consistently with the standards, conditions, and procedures set forth in subdivisions (c), (d), and (h) of Section 128.7.") Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
